description.text: I'm a Frontend Developer based in Madrid with a passion for creating intuitive and visually engaging digital experiences. My work focuses on transforming ideas into clean, responsive, and accessible user interfaces that make an impact. From design systems to performance optimization, I enjoy paying attention to every detail that shapes how people interact with technology.

Driven by curiosity and a commitment to continuous learning, I love exploring new tools and frameworks to stay at the forefront of frontend development. Whether collaborating with teams or working independently, I value clear communication, thoughtful design, and building products that are both beautiful and effective.

items.title: Academic Foundation
items.description: During my High School studies, I developed strong critical‑thinking skills and a solid understanding of social and cultural contexts. Over time, I discovered my passion for technology and programming, which led me to pursue a career in web development.

items.title: Higher Vocational Training in Web Application Development
items.description: I completed a two‑year vocational program focused on Web Application Development, where I gained practical experience in programming, databases, web design, and modern development methodologies. This training strengthened my technical foundation and prepared me to build real‑world projects.

items.title: Internship
items.description: During my internship at Alebat Education, I worked as a Frontend Developer Intern contributing to production‑ready features using Vue 3, Nuxt 3, and TypeScript. I built scalable UI components with SCSS, implemented internationalization support, and collaborated within an Agile team. I also participated in code reviews, applying Clean Code principles to maintain clarity, consistency, and long‑term maintainability.

items.title: Personal Projects
items.description: I continue to grow through personal projects, exploring new technologies and expanding my portfolio. I’m motivated by continuous learning and by improving every day as a frontend developer.

seo.metaTitle: About Me | María T. Fernández - Frontend Developer
seo.metaDescription: I am a frontend developer specialized in Vue.js. Passionate about building accessible, creative interfaces focused on user experience.
seo.ogTitle: About Me | María T. Fernández - Frontend Developer
seo.ogDescription: Learn about my background, interests, and how I apply accessibility and inclusive design in my projects.
seo.author: María T. Fernández
